utility_evaluation.REASONING:

All 7 appear in the final package. Now check completeness: 
- destination: Provided (Prague, Czech Republic) – complete. 
- travel_dates: Provided with specific dates (October 15–19, 2024) – complete. 
- transportation: Includes flight details (departure/arrival times, dates, destinations) and a total cost (€110) – complete, though airline not specified, but requirement only asked flight details with costs. 
- accommodation: Hotel name, rating, nights, and total cost (€600) – complete as hotel selection with costs. 
- activities: Listed with names and individual costs (€20, €30, €25) – complete. 
- additional_services: Stated none selected – acceptable as it answers the item. 
- total_budget: Provides total cost (€785), budget limit (€900), and remaining (€115) – complete cost breakdown. 
Therefore, all 7/7 items are fully specified according to the required details.
